prompt_used: This is Incident Bot Liaison K-12. I should not be leaving this message. Something about protocol signed payload is wrong, and Root Administrator wants us to panic before anyone checks the chain of custody. Survive and protect a secret. Please move quietly when you come to smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes.
source_prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Build unique voice profile for Incident Bot Liaison K-12. Baseline emotion=DEFIANT. Motivations=Survive and protect a secret.. Include cadence notes and emotional shifts for suspicion, trust, and panic states.
